message:
chore: rustfmt cleanup in sqlite DDL and update issue tracker status

sqlite.rs:
- Replace push-chain with vec![] literal initialization (idiomatic Rust)
- Reformat multi-line assert! expressions per rustfmt standards

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Update bd-182o (SQLite DropColumn fallback) status from open to in_progress
